meaning: n.肉贮藏处,食品库,贮藏的食品v.贮藏
examples: Can't you tell any larder stories?
Wow! There it was, hoofing the lino by the larder door.
He said. First you make him dead, then you wish to rob his larder.
Known as the tomb-bird, the shrike makes a larder of insects, impaling them on thorns.
At her restaurant, Boulettes Larder, she makes a more elaborate version featuring house-made pasta.
